claim_boundary: custom CoSG source-holdout diagnostic only; not official CodecFake+ benchmark
PEFT XLS-R adapter has seed42 only
ASVspoof5 and CoRS official/proxy training are not yet staged/executed
current_thesis: Probe-guided trained validation shows that lightweight XLS-R adaptation improves average source-holdout transfer, but can induce a stable-looking source-specific failure mode that validation on other generators does not detect.

next_actions_ranked.action: Run targeted PEFT MASKGCT seeds 123 and 2024.
next_actions_ranked.compute: 2 folds x 10 epochs; GPU; small artifact footprint
next_actions_ranked.why: Cheapest test of whether the key failure mode is seed-stable.

next_actions_ranked.action: If MASKGCT repeats, run PEFT all-fold seeds 123 and 2024.
next_actions_ranked.compute: 18 folds x 10 epochs; overnight-class GPU queue
next_actions_ranked.why: Turns PEFT-vs-frozen into a fair 3-seed comparison.

next_actions_ranked.action: Write a mechanism note for adaptation-induced source inversion.
next_actions_ranked.compute: CPU/docs; may add score-distribution plots later
next_actions_ranked.why: This is the emerging scientific contribution, not a benchmark chase.

next_actions_ranked.action: Plan CoRS extraction/indexing and ASVspoof5 staging as external validation tracks.
next_actions_ranked.compute: storage/data engineering first; no model training yet
next_actions_ranked.why: Needed for official/full-dataset claims, but premature before PEFT stability.

updated_decisions: Stop treating frozen-feature probes as more than weak triage for trained behavior.
Treat XLS-R frozen backend as a confirmed diagnostic baseline for CoSG source-holdout, not the target model.
Treat PEFT as the leading model family, but do not claim PEFT robustness until seeds 123/2024 complete.
Make MASKGCT the primary failure-mode case study if PEFT collapse repeats across seeds.
Defer full fine-tuning until PEFT seed stability and MASKGCT mechanism are understood.
Defer ASVspoof5 and CoRS execution until the local CoSG mechanism story is written cleanly and dataset setup is planned.
